top_signals.title: Bracing for Yen Swings; US Jobs Ease Fed-Hike Concerns | The Asia Trade 7/3/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Europe Now Believes Some Hormuz Fees Will Be Inevitable
top_signals.summary: Some leading European powers now accept that ships transiting the vital Strait of Hormuz will have to pay fees to Iran and Oman, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg's Patrick Sykes has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong bookseller Lam Wing-kee, once detained by China, dies in Taipei
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
